changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS sch_third_party_data;

changeSet.author: P44065

column.name: id
column.remarks: The staging emissions monitoring plan id (primary key)

column.name: account_id
column.remarks: The account id to which the staging data entry refers to

column.name: provider_name
column.remarks: The name of the data provider

column.name: created_on
column.remarks: When the data was initially received

column.name: imported_on
column.remarks: When the data was imported on EMP task

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS sch_third_party_data.emp_staging_account_id_idx; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sch_third_party_data.emp_staging;
